bin.description: The Bank Identification Number (BIN). This is the first 4 to 8 digits of the account number.

last4.description: The account number's last four digits.

expiration.description: The expiration date, in YYYY-MM format.

token.description: The Bolt token associated with the credit card.

affirm_vcn_token.description: The checkout token associated with Affirm VCN credit cards.

default.description: Indicates whether this credit card is the default payment method.
